page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor running at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark data positions this server in the average tier across most compute and memory tests. It achieves a stress-ng single-core CPU performance score of 1824.08 and a multi-core score of 15445.03. Memory bandwidth tests show 840.5 GB/sec for cached small blocks, which drops to 82.77 GB/sec for uncached large block reads. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX and AVX-512F, which assist in cryptographic and integer-heavy operations, as reflected in its Passmark CPU encryption score of 8454.42.

This server is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, including static web serving, software compilation, and database operations. It handles up to 15.3 million Redis SET operations per second and delivers a static web serving throughput of 16.5 GB/sec. While it performs adequately for lightweight LLM inference on small models, processing 1252.41 tokens per second on a 135M model, performance drops significantly to 31.18 tokens per second on medium 7B models, indicating it is not designed for heavy machine learning workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, operating on a KVM hypervisor. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 8674.0 and a static web serving throughput of 16.5 GB/sec. It handles Redis SET operations at 15.3 million operations per second and performs well on software compilation and lightweight LLM inference. The balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it highly cost-efficient for standard enterprise workloads, including web serving, database operations, and general-purpose applications that do not require high-speed local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering balanced performance for web serving and databases.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine offering dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 64 GB RAM for reliable web serving and database workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Optimized for web serving, database operations, and software compilation
